# Incident Report Template

**Incident ID**: [Auto-generated]
**Date of Report**: [YYYY-MM-DD]
**Reported by**: [Name, Role]
**Contact**: [Email/Phone]

---

## 1. Incident Details
**Date/Time of Incident**: [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM]
**Detection Method**: [e.g., Automated alert, Employee report]
**Classification**: [Level 1 (Low) / Level 2 (Medium) / Level 3 (High)]

### 1.1 Description
[Brief description of the incident, including systems/data affected.]

### 1.2 Impact
- **Confidentiality**: [e.g., Data exposed, None]
- **Integrity**: [e.g., Data altered, None]
- **Availability**: [e.g., System downtime, None]
- **Regulatory**: [e.g., GDPR breach, None]

---

## 2. Response Actions
### 2.1 Containment
[Steps taken to contain the incident (e.g., isolated system, revoked access).]

### 2.2 Eradication
[Steps taken to remove the threat (e.g., malware removal, patch applied).]

### 2.3 Recovery
[Steps taken to restore systems/data (e.g., restored from backup, validated integrity).]

---

## 3. Root Cause Analysis
[Brief analysis of the root cause (e.g., phishing attack, unpatched vulnerability).]

---

## 4. Lessons Learned
[Action items to prevent recurrence (e.g., additional training, new controls).]

---

## 5. Approvals
**Incident Response Manager**: _______________________ [Name, Date]
**IT Manager**: _______________________ [Name, Date]
